// FFI bindings to the C standard library (libc).
// ABI: C calling convention. All pointers must be non-null unless documented.
// Ownership: malloc returns owned memory; free consumes it. memcpy does not take ownership.
// Nullability: `s` in strlen must be null-terminated and non-null.
extern "C" {
    fn malloc(size: usize) -> *mut u8;
    fn free(ptr: *mut u8);
    fn strlen(s: *const u8) -> usize;
    fn memcpy(dest: *mut u8, src: *const u8, n: usize) -> *mut u8;
}

// Windows API bindings.
// ABI: "system" (stdcall on x86, C on x86_64). Handles are opaque; do not dereference.
// Lifetime: CreateFileA returns a HANDLE that must be closed with CloseHandle.
extern "system" {
    fn GetLastError() -> u32;
    fn CreateFileA(
        name: *const u8,
        access: u32,
        share: u32,
        sec: *mut u8,
        disp: u32,
        flags: u32,
        template: *mut u8,
    ) -> isize;
}
